description: This file defines a singly linked list implementation in Kotlin, including methods for adding, removing, sizing, and retrieving elements, along with internal node management.

classes.name: LinkedList
classes.description: A Kotlin class implementing a singly linked list data structure with operations to add, remove, get size, and retrieve elements by index.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a new element to the end of the linked list.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the first occurrence of the specified element from the list, returning true if removal was successful.

methods.name: size
methods.description: Returns the total number of elements currently in the list.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the element at a specified index, throwing an exception if index is out of bounds.

methods.name: unlink
methods.description: Internal method to unlink a node from the list during removal.
